# UC-13.6.7 · Grafana Dashboard Version History and Revert Event Tracking

## Description

Frequent saves or sudden reverts on production dashboards may indicate edit wars, automation mistakes, or unauthorized changes. A consolidated audit trail supports governance without blocking legitimate iteration.

## Value

Preserves dashboard integrity for executive KPIs and regulated operational views.

## Implementation

Map `dashboard_uid` to human titles via nightly API export. Alert on `revert` actions outside business hours. Pair with GitOps provisioning diffs if dashboards are code-managed.

## SPL

```spl
index=observability sourcetype="grafana:audit"
| search dashboard AND (action="*save*" OR action="*restore*" OR action="*version*" OR match(lower(_raw),"(?i)revert|rollback"))
| stats count, earliest(_time) as first_t, latest(_time) as last_t, values(action) as actions by dashboard_uid, user
| eval actions_join=mvjoin(actions, " ")
| where count >= 5 OR match(lower(actions_join),"(?i)revert|restore")
| sort -count
```

## Visualization

Timeline (version events), sankey (user → dashboard), count of reverts per org.

## References

- [Grafana — Dashboard versions](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/dashboards/build-dashboards/manage-version-history/)
